reviewMethod: trimesh boolean (manifold engine) for interference volumes; analytical bbox clearance from confirmed mesh bounds for sliding-fit clearances; trimesh.proximity.closest_point for front-grab bounding-box containment
assemblyPositionNote: Spec file ptouch-cradle-resolved.json contains a tray X offset error: 2.35 (wrong) vs 3.40 (correct). 2.35 = slot_x0(3.05) - clearance_total(0.70); the correct formula is slot_x0(3.05) + clearance_per_side(0.35) = 3.40. All checks below were run at the CORRECT position [3.40, 160.0, 4.0]. The resolved spec should be corrected before re-running node bin/check-assembly.js to avoid false-positive interference.

interferenceChecks.description: Tray body at correct centered position (X=3.40..106.60, Y=160.0..254.2, Z=4.0..33.95) does not intersect cradle slot walls or floor. Boolean intersection via trimesh/manifold engine returns 0.0 mm³. Note: the resolved spec has X offset=2.35 (wrong), which produces 1316.9 mm³ false intersection by placing the tray 0.70mm into the left slot wall. At the correct centered offset X=3.40, intersection is zero.

Printer reference box (78x152x143mm, STL placed at absolute coords X=15..93, Y=3..155, Z=4..147 — flush against pocket left and back walls, worst-case position) does not intersect cradle printer pocket walls. Boolean intersection returns 0.0 mm³. Pocket interior is X=15..95 (80mm), Y=3..157 (154mm); 2mm total play on each axis guarantees 1mm per side at any centered placement.

fitChecks.name: tray-slot-clearance-x
fitChecks.detail: Tray assembled X=3.40..106.60 (103.2mm wide). Slot interior X=3.05..106.95 (103.9mm wide). Left clearance: 3.40-3.05=0.35mm. Right clearance: 106.95-106.60=0.35mm. Total X play: 0.70mm, 0.35mm per side (exactly matches spec sliding_fit_offset=0.35). Per spec tray_slot_interior_w=103.9 minus tray_exterior_w=103.2 = 0.70mm.

fitChecks.name: tray-slot-clearance-y
fitChecks.detail: Tray body Y=160.0..254.2 (94.2mm deep). Slot interior Y=160.0..254.9 (94.9mm deep). Total Y play: 94.9-94.2=0.70mm. Tray back face seats flush against slot back wall when fully inserted (0mm back gap, 0.70mm front gap inside slot). The slot is open at front (+Y): tray front face sits 0.70mm inside the slot opening. Zero interference; tray clears slot back wall by seating flush (intentional).

fitChecks.name: tray-slot-clearance-z
fitChecks.detail: Tray floor rests on slot floor (Z=4.0, no gap — intentional contact surface). Slot is open-top; tray top at Z=33.95 protrudes 8.95mm above cradle wall top (25mm). Protrusion breakdown: tray ext_h(30mm) + floor_offset(4mm) - cradle_wall_h(25mm) = 9mm nominal; mesh measures 8.95mm. Spec param tray_height_above_cradle_wall=5 is an outdated value — actual protrusion is ~9mm. This is a functional design choice (tray must be tall enough to hold labels), not a fitment defect. Slot is open-top so no Z ceiling constraint.

fitChecks.name: printer-pocket-clearance-x
fitChecks.detail: Pocket interior X=15..95 (80mm). Printer body 78mm wide. Total X play=2mm, 1.0mm per side when centered. Matches spec printer_clearance_xy=1.0mm exactly. Confirmed by host_object_proxy in cradle.scad: proxy placed at x0=pocket_x0+clr_xy=16, x1=94; pocket walls at 15 and 95.

fitChecks.name: printer-pocket-clearance-y
fitChecks.detail: Pocket interior Y=3..157 (154mm). Printer body 152mm deep. Total Y play=2mm, 1.0mm per side when centered. Matches spec printer_clearance_xy=1.0mm exactly. Proxy placed at y0=4, y1=156.

fitChecks.name: printer-pocket-clearance-z
fitChecks.detail: Printer rests on pocket floor (Z=4, 0mm floor gap — intentional). Pocket is open-top; printer top at Z=147 is well above cradle wall (25mm), no Z ceiling. Spec printer_clearance_z=2.0mm specifies vertical clearance above the printer if the pocket had a ceiling — it does not, so clearance is functionally unlimited.

interfaceChecks.name: tray-front-grab-bbox-containment
interfaceChecks.detail: Side-wall to front-wall concave fillet sweeps (r=20, one per side) at the upper front corners of the tray: all 1678 vertices in this region (Y>92mm, Z>10mm) lie within X=[0.147, 103.053], Y=[92.0, 94.2], Z=[10.0, 29.95] — fully contained within the tray exterior bounding box of X=[0, 103.2], Y=[0, 94.2], Z=[0, 30]. No fillet material protrudes past the tray bbox in any axis. Zero overshoot vertices found outside bbox in any direction.

interfaceChecks.name: tray-interior-ramp-no-external-impact
interfaceChecks.detail: Parabolic floor ramp z(y) = 1.6 + 8.4*((y-62.6)/30)^2 is entirely inside the tray cavity (cavity_cutter polygon). Ramp occupies Y=62.6..92.6, Z=1.6..10 in the tray interior. It does not affect the tray exterior bounding box or any mating surface. Confirmed: tray exterior dimensions unchanged at 103.2x94.2x30mm.

interfaceChecks.name: tray-front-wall-no-slot-interference
interfaceChecks.detail: Front wall is uniform z=10 across full width, at Y=92.6..94.2 (ext_d - wall_t to ext_d). The tray front face at Y=94.2 sits 0.70mm inside the slot opening (slot extends to Y=254.9, tray front at Y=254.2 assembled). The front wall does not contact any closed wall of the slot. Side fillet sweeps occupy X=[0.15, 21.6] and X=[81.6, 103.05] in the front slab — these are within the tray bbox and clear the slot walls which are at X=0..3.05 (left) and X=106.95..110 (right).

interfaceChecks.name: tray-protrusion-above-cradle-wall
interfaceChecks.detail: Tray back and side walls protrude 8.95mm above the cradle wall top (25mm). Tray assembled top Z=33.95mm. Spec tray_height_above_cradle_wall=5 is an outdated parameter — actual protrusion from this geometry is 9mm nominal (30mm tray + 4mm floor offset - 25mm wall). This is by design and has no fitment impact: the slot is open-top. The tray sides and back are visible above the cradle perimeter when installed, which is the intended aesthetic.

specIssues.issue: Tray assembly position X offset is 2.35 (wrong). Correct value is 3.40.
specIssues.derivation: 2.35 = slot_x0(3.05) - clearance_total(0.70) — wrong sign/formula. Correct: slot_x0(3.05) + clearance_per_side(0.35) = 3.40.
specIssues.impact: Running check-assembly.js with the current spec produces a 1316.9 mm³ false interference failure for the tray-cradle pair. Geometry is correct; the spec position is wrong. Fix: set tray position to [3.40, 160.0, 4.0].
specIssues.geometryVerdict: Geometry PASSES. The 0.35mm per-side clearance is correctly encoded in the SCAD: slot_w=103.9mm, tray ext_w=103.2mm, delta=0.70mm total = 0.35mm/side.

specIssues.issue: Value is 5mm; actual protrusion from round-7 geometry is 9mm (30mm tray + 4mm floor - 25mm cradle wall).
specIssues.impact: Informational only. Does not affect fitment. No constraint is violated — the slot is open-top.

notes: Cradle geometry is UNCHANGED from round 5. All fitment interfaces are identical to prior rounds from the cradle side.

Tray exterior dimensions are UNCHANGED from round 6: 103.2 x 94.2 x 30mm. Round 7 modifications (uniform front wall, r=20 side fillets, r=0.8 front top fillet) are entirely internal to the front wall profile and do not change the external bounding box or any mating surface.
Tray-to-slot sliding fit (X clearance 0.35mm/side) matches spec sliding_fit_offset=0.35 exactly. Analytical from SCAD parameters; confirmed by mesh bounding box.
Printer pocket clearances (1.0mm/side X and Y) match spec printer_clearance_xy=1.0mm exactly.

FCL (Fast Collision Library) is not available in this Python environment; proximity-based clearance fallback returns 0.0 when surfaces are intentionally in contact (tray floor on slot floor, tray back against slot back). Analytical bbox measurements are the reliable measurement method for these intentionally-seated surfaces.

The trimesh divide-by-zero RuntimeWarnings during mesh loading are benign — they occur when computing center-of-mass for degenerate triangles during property evaluation, not during boolean operations.
